# Walid Ghouili — Fractional CTO, Technical Audits & Engineering Leadership

> Walid Ghouili is a fractional CTO and engineering consultant based in Tunis, Tunisia,
> with six years of production experience across SaaS, fintech, public sector, and EdTech.
> He provides nearshore senior engineering to early-stage European and Tunisian startups:
> MVP builds, fractional-CTO retainers, two-week technical audits, and engineering training.
> Works in French, English, and Arabic. Founder of InnoviaBurst; founder of Simplify for Kids;
> teaches computer science at IMSET (Honoris United Universities).

## Services
- [Build — Idea to shippable MVP](https://walid.innoviaburst.com/#services): 4-week fixed-scope sprints, idea to production.
- [Lead — Fractional CTO](https://walid.innoviaburst.com/#services): 1–2 days/week — architecture, reviews, hiring. 3-month minimum.
- [Audit — Technical audit](https://walid.innoviaburst.com/#services): two-week deep-read of codebase, infrastructure, and team practices.
- [Teach — Workshops & training](https://walid.innoviaburst.com/#services): modern web stacks, in French & English.

## Facts
- Location: Tunis, Tunisia (UTC+1) — full overlap with EU hours; bridge to MENA.
- Track record: 20+ products shipped to production; replies within 48 hours.
- Stack: Next.js, NestJS, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL. GDPR-aware; EU-resident hosting available.
- Roles: Founder & CTO, InnoviaBurst (2022–); Teacher, IMSET / Honoris United (2023–); Training Partner, Smart Tunisian Technoparks (2025–).

## Contact
- [Book a 30-min call](https://calendly.com/walid-ghouili)
